XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replace the custom IpDbSearcher implementation with the standard ip2region IpSearcher class to leverage official library features.
Implement pre-loading of VectorIndex into memory to reduce IO operations during IP lookups, a feature specific to the new searcher API.
Rename the configuration property for the database path from 'dbFile' to 'dbFilePath' for clarity.
Replace manual getter and setter methods with the Lombok @Data annotation to reduce boilerplate code.
XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.human_impl: Added @Data annotation and removed explicit getAvatarUrl, setAvatarUrl, getName, setName, getVersion, setVersion methods.

Added a 'desc' field to store human-readable descriptions for login types.

Added a static lookup method to retrieve enum instances by their string code using Streams.

XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Added logic to strip the 'Bearer ' prefix from the token string if present, ensuring the raw token is returned.
Implement double-checked locking pattern to ensure thread-safe singleton initialization without performance penalty.
Increase HTTP connection, write, and read timeouts from 1 second to 10 seconds to prevent premature failures.
Add an OkHttp interceptor to automatically inject a User-Agent header into all outgoing requests.
Standardize code formatting by removing excessive whitespace and aligning braces.
XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.human_impl: Removed empty lines at the top of the file and adjusted brace placement in if/switch statements.

XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Fix spacing around operators and assignments for better readability.
XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.human_impl: Added spaces around `=`, `==`, `!=`, and other operators (e.g., `ip = inet.getHostAddress()`).

XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Standardize Javadoc formatting by removing extra indentation.
XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.human_impl: Aligned `@param` and `@return` tags in Javadoc comments.

XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Add missing closing braces for if-statements to comply with standard coding conventions.
XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.human_impl: Added `{` and `}` around single-line if bodies (e.g., `if (p.length != 4) { return 0; }`).

XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Removed the unused `stringToMD5` method to clean up the utility class.
Removed the unused `getPassword` method which performed iterative hashing.
Removed the `main` method used for local testing.
Replaced implicit platform-dependent charset in `getBytes()` with explicit `StandardCharsets.UTF_8` for portability.
XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.human_impl: Changed `content.getBytes()` to `content.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8)` in the new overloaded method.

XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Added a new `getMd5` overload that accepts a secret string for HMAC-like signing.
XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.human_impl: Added `public static String getMd5(String content, String secret)` method.

XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replaced manual BigInteger hex conversion with StringBuilder and String.format for cleaner hex encoding in the new method.
Changed the exception type thrown in the new method to a custom `SoException`.
